completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (React 19.2.4 PWA + TS 5.9.3 + Vite 7.3.1 + Supabase 2.99.0 + Zustand 5.0.11 + Tailwind 4.1.17 + Zod 4.3.6)
Found 104 existing doc files in docs/, ~177 source files in src/ (~45,102 lines), 108 test files in tests/, 25 SQL migrations, 19 CI workflows, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md
Tech stack: React 19.2.4, TS 5.9.3, Vite 7.3.1, Zustand 5.0.11, Supabase 2.99.0, Tailwind 4.1.17, Framer Motion 12.35.2, Zod 4.3.6, Sentry 10.42.0, Vitest 4.0.18, Playwright 1.58.2

4 parallel agents completed exhaustive scan: Agent A (project-overview 7 files + architecture 7 files + source-tree 6 files), Agent B (api-reference 4 files + data-models 10 files), Agent C (component-inventory 6 files + state-management 5 files), Agent D (development-guide 10 files + performance 2 files)
Master index.md updated: corrected Tailwind 4.2.1->4.1.17, Vitest 4.0.17->4.0.18, source files 207->177, hooks 13->15, scripts 36->30, migrations 24->25, updated timestamps
Validation: No '(To be generated)' markers found. No TBD/TODO/Pending placeholder markers found. Checklist verified.

Finalized. ~104 markdown files across 10 sections. Key changes from prior scan: Tailwind version corrected 4.2.1->4.1.17, source files 207->177 (consolidation), test files 85->108, npm scripts 36->30, migrations 24->25 (claude_bot_config), SW precache strategy corrected (JS/CSS now precached), coverage threshold corrected 80%->25%, mood slice SyncStatus type fixed, notes slice 6->11 actions, photos slice nonexistent fields removed, scripture slice missing state added, logger docs corrected, component store connections fixed, performance baseline refreshed (main entry +23% to 129KB gzip)

changes: Love Notes chat scroll-to-bottom fix on re-entry (requestAnimationFrame)
SW precache strategy fix: JS/CSS now precached, HTML excluded via NetworkFirst NavigationRoute
Scripture bugs/refactoring + CI improvements + logger utility
UI test findings from manual QA session
